approved_by: human approval of E9 execution plan for Marketplace expansion

input_snapshot.algorithm: sha256 over sorted per-file sha256 digests (excluding .DS_Store)

execution_metadata.note: Tool versions are an execution snapshot, not normative governance.

created_files: apps/mobile/app/(customer)/bookings/[id]/pay.tsx — checkout route for a booking payment.
apps/mobile/app/(customer)/payment-methods.tsx — customer payment methods management screen route.
apps/mobile/src/features/marketplace/screens/AddServiceScreen.tsx — screen for technicians to publish a service.
apps/mobile/src/features/payment/FakePaymentProvider.ts — in-memory payment provider implementing the PaymentProvider port.
apps/mobile/src/features/payment/FakePaymentService.ts — application service orchestrating fake authorization and capture.
modified_files: apps/mobile/app/(customer)/_layout.tsx — registered payment and booking-payment routes.
apps/mobile/app/(technician)/_layout.tsx — registered earnings and services routes.
apps/mobile/src/features/booking/screens/CustomerBookingDetailScreen.tsx — navigate to checkout when payment is pending.
apps/mobile/src/features/marketplace/FakeServiceCatalogService.ts — seeded professionals and technician-oriented service listings.
apps/mobile/src/features/marketplace/screens/HomeScreen.tsx — added quick actions for professional profile and payment methods.
apps/mobile/src/features/technician/screens/TechnicianHomeScreen.tsx — added services and earnings quick actions.
packages/domain/src/aggregates/Payment.ts — added getters and state helpers.
packages/domain/src/repositories/index.ts — exported payment and payout repositories.
packages/types/src/dto/index.ts — added PaymentMethodDto, PaymentDto, InvoiceDto, PayoutDto, TransactionDto.
packages/types/src/ids/index.ts — added PayoutId and TransactionId branded identifiers.
packages/ui/src/__tests__/components/scaffolded-components.test.tsx — updated marketplace/payment scaffolded component tests to use real props.
mutations.note: node_modules/ and .turbo/ directories are install/build artifacts and are not listed as authored mutations.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Stripe Connect Express is the first payment provider per resolved decision D2; E9 implements only a FakePaymentProvider satisfying the PaymentProvider port.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Avoids live Stripe API dependencies and network calls while establishing the exact domain and application contracts for later provider integration.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Payment aggregate supports authorized/captured status; Payout aggregate introduced for technician earnings; in-memory repositories only.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Keeps domain pure and backend-independent; database persistence belongs to a later Supabase integration expedition.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: ProfessionalCard, ServiceCard, PaymentMethodCard, InvoiceCard, and PaymentSummary implemented as real components consuming @taskpro/design-tokens and @taskpro/types DTOs.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: E9 turns the E3 scaffolded placeholders into the executable visual contract for marketplace and payment surfaces.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Professional profile, technician service list, and add-service screen implemented over FakeServiceCatalogService.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Completes the marketplace vertical slice without requiring new Supabase migrations or backend resources.
Current marketplace is customer-professional-booking; organizations add ownership ambiguity before it is required.

exclusions: No live Stripe API calls or Stripe Connect onboarding.
No real payment capture, refund, or dispute workflows against a backend.
No new Supabase migrations or schema changes beyond E4.
No organization, location, team, or branch aggregates.
No changes to knowledge/ authored artifacts.
No changes to .synth/ governance primitives beyond this replay record, governance-0022, and the E9 expedition state projection.
No git commits, branches, tags, or pushes performed.
